title: Replace localStorage Signal Persistence with Server-Side Storage
problem: Signal data stored in browser localStorage, making it ephemeral, per-device. AI chat endpoint can't access localStorage from edge runtime and falls back to hardcoded sample data.
approach: Create PostgreSQL-backed signal repository with REST API. Replace localStorage with API calls to /api/signals. Update AI chat tools to query real signal service.

title: Consolidate Duplicate Rate Limiting Implementations
problem: Two separate rate limiter files (lib/rate-limiter.ts and lib/rate-limit.ts) with different APIs and defaults. Creates confusion and inconsistent limits.
approach: Delete rate-limiter.ts, standardize on LRU-cache version. Create middleware wrapper for Next.js API routes. Add per-route configuration.

title: Implement Proper Authentication and Session Management
problem: Login calls useAuth() but authentication is client-side only. No middleware protecting API routes. Any unauthenticated user can hit /api/* endpoints.
approach: Add Next.js middleware validating JWT tokens. Implement server-side session verification. Add CSRF protection. Create withAuth() wrapper for API routes.

title: Add Error Boundaries and Loading States Across All Pages
problem: Only signal-library has error.tsx and loading.tsx. Other pages (/analytics, /agent, /admin, /oracle-ml, etc) have no error boundaries. Errors crash entire app.
approach: Create shared ErrorBoundary with retry. Add error.tsx and loading.tsx to every route. Implement global error boundary in layout.tsx.

title: Extract Hardcoded API URLs and Add Environment Validation
problem: easy-button page hardcodes production Railway URL. Not all files use lib/constants.ts. No startup validation for required env vars.
approach: Audit files for hardcoded URLs, replace with constants.ts. Add startup validation for required env vars with clear error messages.

title: Implement Comprehensive E2E Test Suite
problem: Only signal-library has Playwright tests. No E2E coverage for critical flows like login → dashboard → signal creation, or oracle-ml query → chart rendering.
approach: Set up Playwright with CI. Write tests for critical paths: auth flow, signal creation, data queries, chart rendering. Add visual regression tests.

title: Add TypeScript Strict Mode and Fix Type Errors
problem: Multiple files have @ts-ignore or any types. No strict null checks. Type errors in signals/signal-helpers.ts, lib/db/oracle.ts, and api routes.
approach: Enable strict mode in tsconfig.json. Replace @ts-ignore with proper types. Add strict null checks. Fix type errors in key files.

title: Optimize Bundle Size and Add Code Splitting
problem: Large bundle size. No route-based code splitting for heavy pages like /visual-builder (React Flow) and /analytics (Recharts).
approach: Implement React.lazy() for heavy routes. Lazy load Recharts and React Flow. Add bundle analyzer. Target <500KB initial JS.

title: Implement Caching Strategy with Stale-While-Revalidate
problem: No caching for API responses. Every page load refetches all data even when nothing changed. Slow perceived performance.
approach: Add SWR or React Query for client-side caching. Implement stale-while-revalidate for API routes. Add cache headers.

title: Add Accessibility Audit and Fixes
problem: No aria labels on interactive elements. Poor color contrast in some components. No keyboard navigation for some features.
approach: Run axe-core audit. Add aria labels, roles, focus management. Fix color contrast issues. Ensure full keyboard navigation.
